title: Fragile struct in6_addr redefinition detection in ipv6_addr.h
description: Location: ipv6_addr.h:43-56. Detection of existing in6_addr relies on checking preprocessor guards: _NETINET_IN_H, _NETINET_IN_H_, _NETINET6_IN6_H, __NETINET_IN_H__, ZEPHYR_INCLUDE_POSIX_NETINET_IN_H_. This list is incomplete (misses musl, bionic, newlib variants) and will break silently if a new libc is used. On redefinition, compiler may error or silently use wrong struct. Consider using __has_include or a configure-time check instead.
